accounts_helper: L'autenticazione di questa app è fornita da Better Auth, che supporta diversi metodi di autenticazione. Ogni metodo è chiamato "provider". Per esempio, l'autenticazione tramite email e password è un provider, Google è un provider, ecc. Di seguito quelli associati al tuo profilo.
admin_notes_helper: Le note non sono private: gli amministratori possono visualizzarle.
api_app_description:
Slugs è una piattaforma di short URL self-hosted con dashboard integrata, controllo degli accessi granulare e API REST. È nata come progetto personale per esplorare Svelte ed è arrivata a una release stabile v1.0 con funzionalità pronte per la produzione.

La documentazione API di Better-Auth è disponibile separatamente
api_desc: Quando `true`, i risultati sono ordinati in ordine decrescente. Quando `false`, in ordine crescente.
api_expand: Elenco separato da virgole delle relazioni da espandere. Supporta percorsi nidificati (es. `user`, `tags`, `user.organization`).
api_fields: Elenco separato da virgole dei campi da includere nel risultato. Usato insieme a `expand` per controllare i payload delle relazioni.
api_global_metrics_description: Restituisce metriche d'uso aggregate per il tuo workspace in un intervallo di tempo.
api_global_metrics_extended_param: Se `true`, include ulteriori ripartizioni e metriche derivate nella risposta.
api_global_metrics_url_id: L'id URL con cui filtrare le metriche.
api_health_check: Restituisce lo stato di integrità dell'API
urls_at_risk: URL attualmente bloccati o non sicuri
no_data_for_range: Nessun dato per il periodo selezionato
api_health_error_db_unknown: Errore sconosciuto del database durante l'health check.
api_key_copy_helper: Scarica o trascrivi questa chiave perchè verrà mostrata solo una volta. In database è storata crittata e non sarà più disponibile.
api_key_create_helper: Puoi impostare una scadenza o delle policy di controllo sulla chiave API.
api_key_delete: Questo cancellerà le chiavi selezionate. L'operazione è irreversibile e tutte le risorse collegate attraverso questa chiave cesserano di funzionare. Vuoi continuare?
api_key_no_results: Non ci sono chiavi API associate a questo account. Vuoi crearne una?
api_key_rate_limited: Questa opzione ti permette di impostare un limite personalizzato alla frequenza delle chiamate API
api_offset: Offset del cursore sul set di dati. Usato in combinazione `limit` + `offset` per ottenere una lista impaginata. (0+)
api_page_limit: Limite di oggetti restituiti dalla chiamata.
api_query: Ricerca libera sulle colonne `notes` e `originalUrl`. Non distingue tra maiuscole e minuscole.
api_single_url_helper: Restituisce un URL associato ad un utente (gli admin possono accedere a tutte le risorse)
api_sort: Ordinamento della lista. Corrisponde alle colonne presenti nell'oggetto URL restituito
api_tag_create_description: Crea una o più tag se già non esistono.
api_tag_delete_conflict: Tag in uso, non può essere cancellato.
api_tag_delete_description: Cancella una tag solo se non associata ad altri URL
api_tag_list_description: Restituisce una lista paginata di tag.
api_tag_list_limit_description: Numero massimo di tag da restituire.
api_tag_list_query_description: Filtro testuale per i nomi delle tag.
api_tags: Filtro tag ripetibile. Restituisce solo URL con almeno una delle tag forniti.
api_url_create_body_description: Elementi richiesti per la creazione di un nuovo URL abbreviato, include destinazione dell'URL, shortcode opzionale, scadenza, tag, e parametri di tracciamento (UTM).
api_url_create_description: Creates a new shortened URL with optional password protection, expiration, tags, teams, and UTM parameters.
api_url_create_success: The URL was creato con successo.
api_url_description: Restituisce una lista paginata di URL records visible to the authenticated user.
api_url_helper: Paginated URL list belonging to the authenticated API key
api_url_metrics_description: Retrieve time-series metrics for a single short URL, with optional detailed breakdowns by browser, device, location, referrer, and UTM data.
api_url_metrics_extended_param: When set to true, includes detailed breakdowns by browser, device, location, referrer, UTM, and visitor organization. When omitted or false, only the basic internal/external time series is returned.
api_url_metrics_from_param: ISO 8601 start date (inclusive) for the metrics window. Defaults to seven days before the end date when not provided.
api_url_metrics_success: Metrics for the requested URL were trovato.
api_url_metrics_summary: Preleva metrics for a short URL.
api_url_metrics_to_param: ISO 8601 end date (inclusive) for the metrics window. Defaults to the current day when not provided.
api_url_tags_delete_description: Detach all tags from the URL, leaving it without tags.
api_url_tags_mutation_success: URL returned with updated tag relations.
api_url_tags_patch_body_description: Tags to add and/or remove from the URL.
api_url_tags_patch_description: Add and/or remove tags from the URL without affecting other relations.
api_url_tags_post_body_description: Array of tags that will become the only tags associated with this URL.
api_url_tags_post_description: Replace all existing tags associated with the URL with the provided list.
api_url_teams_delete_description: Detach the URL from all teams.
api_url_teams_mutation_success: URL returned with updated team relations.
api_url_teams_patch_body_description: Team IDs to add and/or remove from the URL.
api_url_teams_patch_description: Add and/or remove team relations for the URL, preserving other teams.
api_url_teams_post_body_description: Array of team IDs that will become the only teams associated with this URL.
api_url_teams_post_description: Replace all existing team relations for the URL with the provided list.
api_url_update_body_description: Request body used to partially update an existing short URL. Only provided fields are modified; omitted fields remain unchanged. Supports updating destination URL, metadata, expiration, secret protection, tags, and tracking parameters.
api_url_update_description: Update a URL resource belonging to this API key (admin can edit any URL).
ask_sure_user: This will delete the user and all related information. This action cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.
auth_goto_sign_in_helper: If you already have an account, you can sign in.
auth_goto_sign_up_helper: If you do not have an account, you can create one.
auth_reset_password_ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can ignore this message. Your account remains secure.
auth_reset_password_intro: We received a request to reset the password for your {appname} account. If this was you, click the button below to set a new password.
auth_sign_up_disabled: Signup are disabled as per administrator preference.
auth_verification: Welcome to {appname}, a simple and self-hosted URL shortener. You received this email because you registered and still need to verify your account.
auth_verification_code_instruction: Use the following verification code to continue:
auth_verification_otp: Use the following One-Time Password to complete your verification process.
auth_verification_required: You must verify your account to use this platform.
avatar_description: An avatar is a small image representing your profile on the platform.
avatar_location: Avatars are stored at /app/config/avatars/[user.id].webp.
ban_duration_helper: The time until the ban expires. If not provided, the ban will never expire.
ban_user: Bans a user, preventing them from signing in and revokes all of their existing sessions.
blacklisted_helper: This account, username, or email appears to be blacklisted. Please contact the platform administrator.
change_password_helper: Fill out this form to update your credentials.
control_enable_homepage_helper: Hide the homepage and redirect users to the dashboard or a custom URL.
control_enable_homepage_url_helper: Set a custom redirect to a route or external link.
control_enable_limits_helper: API rate limits requested by the community.
control_enable_mfa_helper: Enforce Two-Factor Authentication. Users will be prompted to set up an authenticator if they haven't already.
control_enable_signup_helper: Allow external sign-ups from the front-end.
control_integrations_helper: Configure third-party integrations such as Umami for analytics or VirusTotal API for enhanced security.
control_integrations_umami_url_helper: The URL of https://umami.is or your self-hosted instance.
control_integrations_umami_wid_helper: The Website ID assigned by your Umami instance.
control_integrations_vtapi_apikey_helper: The API Key provided by VirusTotal.
control_smtp_enable_helper: If SMTP is disabled, outgoing mail will be printed to logs in plain text.
control_smtp_from_helper: Emails will be sent from this address.
control_smtp_helper: Configure an SMTP server to send emails through the platform, mainly for authentication purposes.
control_smtp_password_helper: The password used to authenticate with your SMTP server.
control_smtp_username_helper: The username used to authenticate with your SMTP server.
control_smtp_verification: A verification request has been sent to the mail server.
control_smtp_verification_false: The server did not respond successfully. Please check your configuration.
control_watchlists_helper: Configure watchlists for usernames, domains, and emails to improve security.
copy_manually_helper: Select the text and copy it manually.
delete_user_helper: This will delete the user and all associated URL(s) and metadata. This action cannot be undone.
email_ignore: If you didn't expect this email, you may safely ignore it.
errors_blacklisted_url: This URL has been watchlisted by the platform, if you think this is a mistake contact the administrator
errors_db_url: Please enter a valid PostgreSQL database URL.
errors_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors_forbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action.
errors_max_count_reached: You reached your URL count limit set by the administrator of the platform.
errors_password_invalid: The password is not strong enough.
errors_password_unmatch: Password and confirmation do not match.
errors_saving_profile: An error occurred while saving your profile.
errors_shortcode_used: This shortcode is already in use, choose another string, or let the pltaform generate one for you.
errors_slug_unavailable: This slug is already used for another organization.
errors_totp_invalid: The Time-Based One-Time Password was not recognized or may have expired. Please try again.
errors_unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors_unrecognized_host: The application is not configured to run from this origin.
errors_upload_avatar_error: An error occurred while uploading the file. Check logs for more information.
errors_url_disabled: This URL may have been deleted or disabled by the user, or it may have reached a set threshold. If you believe this is an error, please contact the administrator.
errors_username_invalid: Please enter a valid username with at least three characters.
expiration_helper: Setting up an expiration allow to disable automatically the URL after a chosen span of time
helpers_api_key_expires_in: Set how long before an API Key expires.
helpers_api_key_name: A meaningful name for the API Key.
helpers_api_key_permissions: Configure permission policies for the API Key.
helpers_auth_new_password: The new password you want to set.
helpers_auth_password_security: Your password must be at least 8 characters and include a symbol, an uppercase letter, and a lowercase letter.
helpers_organization_name: The name of the organization you are creating.
helpers_organization_origin: The domain of the organization, used as origin.
helpers_organization_slug: The slug of the organization for navigation porpouse.
helpers_teams_name: Insert a name for the group you're creating.
invitation_has_been_accepted: Invitation have been accepted by the user
invitation_has_been_sent: An invitation has been sent to this user email.
invitation_sent_to_users: An invitation email has been sent to the selected users
invitations_empty_helper: Invite a user to be part of this organization, the account will only be valid on organization which the user is part of.
invitations_select_one: Select a voice from the list to see more details about the invitation
invite_selected_users: You are going to invite all the selected users.
invite_user_helper: Register a user on their behalf, they will receive an invitation mail to complete registration.
logo_description: A logo representing your organization on the platform.
logo_location: Logos are stored at /app/config/logos/[organization.id].webp.
mail_org_invite_intro: You have been invited to join the organization {orgName} by {inviter} as {role}. Click the button below to accept the invitation.
mail_text_admin_user_intro: Click the button below to sign in securely using and complete registration process.
mail_text_admin_user_invite:
Hello {email},
You've been invited to sign in to this platform.
Click the link below to continue:
{link}
If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
mail_text_org_invite:
Hello {username},

You have been invited to join the organization {orgName} by {inviter} as {role}. Click the button below to accept the invitation.
Accept the invitation using this link:
{link}

If you did not expect this, you may safely ignore this email.
mail_text_reset_password:
Hello {username},

You requested to reset your password. Use the link below:
{linkToReset}

If you did not make this request, you can ignore this email.
mail_text_verify_email:
Verify Your Email Address

Hello {username},
Thank you for creating an account. Please click the link below to verify your email:

{linkToVerification}

If you did not create an account, you can ignore this email.
metrics_browsers_helper: The browser used to access this organization
metrics_devices_helper: The most used devices to access URL(s)
metrics_from_helper: From where your audience mostly come from.
metrics_languages_helper: The language preferred by the visitor device
metrics_os_helper: The Operating System in use on the visitor device
name: Name
no_users_found: No users were found with this query. To create a New User you have to go the Users page
not_a_member: You are not a member of this organization/team. Please contact platform administrator if you think this is a mistake.
notification_invited_to_org: You have been invited to organization {orgName} by {inviter}
organizations_delete: Deleting this Organization removes it from the configuration file and will make the app inaccessible at its host domain. Access attempts will fail due to an unmanaged service error.
organizations_helper: Organizations allow the platform to be accessed from different origins and domains.
organizations_helper_two: Accessing the platform from an unrecognized origin will be denied.
organizations_select_one: Select an organization to see more details about it
original_url_helper: The original URL you want to shorten
placeholder_rate_limit: Insert max number of callback per ...
privacy_disclaimer: This is a private service. By using this platform, you agree to our Privacy Policy.
rest_api_tokens_helper: Authorize API calls by including the generated token in the Authorization header.
rest_api_tokens_helper_two: API keys are unique and tied to your account, sharing database roles.
role_helper: Admin can help with the app management. They will have same power as platform owner.
rpd_helper: Numero massimo di requests a user can make per day.
rpm_helper: Numero massimo di requests a user can make per minute.
search_users_helper: You can search user by email in order to add them to the organization.
secret_helper: This will render the URL private, and will require a password in order to be redirected to original URL.
select_from_list: Select one item to see more...
send_otp_mail: If you don't have access to your mobile device, you can receive a One-Time Password via email.
sent_verification_email: A verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox to continue.
set_expiration: Set an expiration time to disable this URL automatically.
set_limits: When limit has been reached, the URL will be automatically disabled
set_limits_helper: Speficy amount of redirect before disabling the URL.
set_secret_helper: Set a password to protect this URL.
shortcode_helper: The custom shortend identifier for this URL
spu_helper: Numero massimo di URLs a user can shorten.
stats_app_helper: A quick overview of your {appname} instance.
teams_create_new_helper: Crea a New Team to manage users into groups with access control policies on resources
teams_delete: Elimina a Team to remove it from the platform. URL will be kept as owned and accesible only by the user who created them.
teams_select_one: Select a voice from the list to see more details about the team
two_factor_helper: Enable multi-factor authentication. If you do not have a two-factor device, you can receive a one-time code via email.
two_factor_helper_backup_codes: Backup codes can be used to recover access if you lose access to your device or email.
two_factor_helper_otp: Please enter the OTP to continue.
two_factor_helper_password: Please enter your password to continue.
two_factor_helper_totp: Please enter the TOTP to continue.
two_factor_only_once: Two-factor authentication will be enabled after your first successful submission. You may also generate and download backup codes.
url_protected: This URL is protected. In order to continue redirection enter the password.
url_status_helper: You can set this URL as not active. User will be notified that the URL is disabled.
urls_delete_helper: This will delete the URL and all associated metadata and metrics. This action cannot be undone.
urls_notes_helper: You can set some notes about your url in this panel. Notes will be private (admin excluded)...
users_delete_helper: This will delete the user(s) and all their content on platform. This action cannot be undone.
users_placeholders_notes: Write internal notes about this account here...
utm_helper: Setup UTM parameters for your URL.
utm_key_helper: The key that identify this parameter.
utm_name_helper: A recognizable name for this parameter.
utm_name_placeholder: Insert a name for this UTM...
utm_value_helper: The actual value of the parameter.
verify_your_email: Your email is not yet verified. Please check your inbox.
visits_helper_custom: Showing stats for the selected period.
visits_helper_period: Showing last metric about this URL.
